officialNotice.headline: ⚠️ OFFICIAL NOTICE: NEET 2026 Exam Cancelled, ReNEET will be conducted on 21 June 2026.
officialNotice.subtext: Beware of Touts/Agents Promising Admissions. All Medical Admissions Based on Counselling Only.
officialNotice.warning: From session 2026 onwards, direct admission in any state is prohibited. Candidates must qualify NEET exam to take admission in medical and allied courses (including BVSc & AH) through official counselling only.

bvsc.note: No direct admission provision as per VCI notification. Students must qualify NEET to get admission.

physics.name: Modern Physics
physics.reason: Easiest to score from. Questions are typically straightforward and based directly on NCERT facts and formulas.

physics.name: Optics
physics.reason: Combines diagrams, formula application, and conceptual questions. A very consistent and scoring section.

physics.name: Current Electricity
physics.reason: A favorite for MCQ creators. Focus on circuits, Kirchhoff's laws, and meter bridge concepts.

physics.name: Magnetism & EM Induction
physics.reason: Concepts here lead to multiple questions. Understanding magnetic fields and Faraday's law is essential.

physics.name: Laws of Motion
physics.reason: The absolute base of Mechanics. You must be strong here to solve problems in other units.

physics.name: Work, Energy & Power
physics.reason: Central to physics problem-solving. The work-energy theorem is a powerful tool for many numericals.

physics.name: Rotational Motion
physics.reason: While concepts can be tough, this unit has a high number of predictable, repeated numerical problems.

physics.name: Thermodynamics
physics.reason: Tests your grasp of laws and cycles through both theory and calculation-based questions.

chemistry.name: Coordination Compounds
chemistry.reason: An absolute favorite for question papers. Questions are direct from NCERT.

chemistry.name: Thermodynamics & Equilibrium
chemistry.reason: Core concepts that are applied everywhere. Strong here boosts confidence.

chemistry.name: Electrochemistry
chemistry.reason: Involves clear concepts and numerical problems that are very scoring.

chemistry.name: Chemical Bonding
chemistry.reason: The foundation for understanding molecular structure and properties in chemistry.

chemistry.name: Hydrocarbons & Carbonyl Compounds
chemistry.reason: These form the backbone of organic reaction mechanisms and essential named reactions.

chemistry.name: Biomolecules
chemistry.reason: Directly from NCERT and consistently asked. Focus on carbohydrates, proteins, and nucleic acids.

botany.name: Molecular Basis of Inheritance
botany.reason: DNA, RNA, and central dogma are fundamental. Plant genetics and related concepts are tested in depth every year.

botany.name: Plant Reproduction
botany.reason: A direct, fact-heavy unit from NCERT. Life cycles (like in flowering plants) and diagrams are highly asked.

botany.name: Biodiversity & Ecosystem
botany.reason: Conceptual and factual. Topics like ecological succession, energy flow, and plant adaptations are regulars.

botany.name: Plant Cell Structure & Function
botany.reason: The foundation. Questions on organelles specific to plant cells (like chloroplasts, cell wall) are common.

botany.name: Principles & Applications
botany.reason: A modern and consistently tested area, especially tools like genetic engineering which are often applied to plants.

zoology.name: Breathing, Circulation, Excretion
zoology.reason: The core of human biology. Diagrams (heart, nephron) and physiological processes are question favorites.

zoology.name: Human Reproduction
zoology.reason: A direct, fact-heavy unit from NCERT. Diagrams of reproductive systems and hormonal cycles are highly asked.

zoology.name: Molecular Basis of Inheritance
zoology.reason: DNA, RNA, and central dogma are fundamental. Human genetics and disorders are tested in depth every year.

zoology.name: Animal Cell Structure & Function
zoology.reason: The foundation. Questions on organelles, cell division (meiosis/mitosis), and animal tissues are very common.

zoology.name: Principles & Applications
zoology.reason: A modern and consistently tested area, especially applications in medicine (like gene therapy) and diagnostics.
